/usr/bin/c++  -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sample.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sample.dir/strings/str.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sample.dir/arrays/arr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sample.dir/pointers/ptr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sample.dir/oop/oop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sample.dir/fstream/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sample.dir/threads/thread.cpp.o -o sample
